CustomField.description: Enter the average amount of revenue recognized for the rental period using the straight-line method. The amount entered here will be applied to all associated rent slips not yet invoiced.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the average amount of revenue recognized for the rental period using the straight-line method. The amount entered here will be applied to all associated rent slips not yet invoiced.
CustomField.label: Average SLR Amount
